changes_made.description: Rewrote SKILL.md to emphasize never using read tool on xlsx binary files. Added Python/openpyxl analysis workflow and example. Added load_workbook and iter_rows patterns. Removed reference to bundled template script.

Added guidance to skip non-data rows (TOTAL/summary rows) when analyzing spreadsheets. Updated analysis example to filter out rows with None category or non-numeric amounts. Added currency formatting ($#,##0) and column auto-sizing to creation example for professional presentation.
Confirmation run. Removed unreferenced files (LICENSE.txt, recalc.py, scripts/create_xlsx.py) from skill directory.
